headline: Target Dress Code Shift Ties Store Image To Investor Watchpoints
summary: Target (NYSE:TGT) is rolling out a stricter, standardized dress code for store employees as part of an image refresh. The company is also increasing staff discounts on its owned adult apparel brands to encourage greater employee adoption. These changes are presented as part of a broader push to rebuild customer trust and refine the in store experience. For you as an investor, this move sits at the intersection of retail operations and brand management. Target occupies a large footprint in...
